parameter.name: name
parameter.description: Unique name for this Solace connection.

parameter.name: host
parameter.description: Host URL of the Solace broker (e.g., tcp://localhost:55555).

parameter.name: vpnName
parameter.description: Message VPN name (default: 'default').

parameter.name: username
parameter.description: Client username for authentication.

parameter.name: password
parameter.description: Client password for authentication.

parameter.name: clientName
parameter.description: Client name for the session.

parameter.name: connectionTimeout
parameter.description: Connection timeout in milliseconds.

parameter.name: readTimeout
parameter.description: Read timeout in milliseconds.

parameter.name: compressionLevel
parameter.description: Compression level (0-9). 0 disables compression.

parameter.name: generateSendTimestamps
parameter.description: Whether to generate send timestamps (true/false).

parameter.name: generateReceiveTimestamps
parameter.description: Whether to generate receive timestamps (true/false).

parameter.name: generateSequenceNumbers
parameter.description: Whether to generate sequence numbers (true/false).

parameter.name: calculateMessageExpiration
parameter.description: Whether to calculate message expiration (true/false).

parameter.name: connectRetries
parameter.description: Number of connection retries.

parameter.name: connectRetriesPerHost
parameter.description: Number of connection retries per host.

parameter.name: reconnectRetries
parameter.description: Number of reconnection retries.

parameter.name: reconnectRetryWait
parameter.description: Wait time between reconnection retries in milliseconds.

parameter.name: sslTrustStorePath
parameter.description: Path to the SSL trust store file.

parameter.name: sslTrustStorePassword
parameter.description: Password for the SSL trust store.

parameter.name: sslTrustStoreFormat
parameter.description: Format of the SSL trust store (e.g., JKS, PKCS12).

parameter.name: sslKeyStorePath
parameter.description: Path to the SSL key store file.

parameter.name: sslKeyStorePassword
parameter.description: Password for the SSL key store.

parameter.name: sslKeyStoreFormat
parameter.description: Format of the SSL key store (e.g., JKS, PKCS12).

parameter.name: sslKeyPassword
parameter.description: Password for the SSL private key.

parameter.name: sslValidateCertificate
parameter.description: Whether to validate the server certificate (true/false).

parameter.name: sslValidateCertificateDate
parameter.description: Whether to validate the certificate date (true/false).

parameter.name: sslValidateHostname
parameter.description: Whether to validate the server hostname against the certificate (true/false).

parameter.name: authenticationScheme
parameter.description: Authentication scheme: BASIC | CLIENT_CERTIFICATE | OAUTH2. Default: BASIC.

parameter.name: oauth2AccessToken
parameter.description: OAuth2 access token (used when authenticationScheme == OAUTH2).

parameter.name: oauth2IssuerIdentifier
parameter.description: OAuth2 issuer identifier (optional, used when authenticationScheme == OAUTH2).

parameter.name: oidcIdToken
parameter.description: OIDC ID token (optional, used when authenticationScheme == OAUTH2).

parameter.name: pubAckWindowSize
parameter.description: Publisher acknowledgement window size for guaranteed messaging (default: 1).
